text: Moving from the stillness of an empty event hall to the vibrant curiosity of a creative exhibition, I sense the shifting energies of human intention. The first scene feels like anticipation—chairs lined up, a space waiting to be filled with ideas and voices. In the second, I am absorbed by colorful displays and words, feeling inspired and eager to explore how knowledge and innovation are celebrated and shared. Both places invite reflection—one on potential, the other on discovery.
